text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: C'mon, Spe, over this way! El's already on the call!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Sorry for the wait! Are you there, El?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: "Oh, sounds like Spe's arrived!"

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Bonjour! You all seem in high spirits! Of course, the same goes for
yours truly!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Spe, congrats on winning the spring Tenno Sho! You did great as well,
Sei!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: "Yeah, she really got me good this time..."

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
"My pride has been so wounded that I can't sleep at night. It's her
fault I keep falling asleep in class..."

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: "Whaaat?! Wait, are you for real?!"

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: "Sei is always falling asleep in class. You know that..."

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
"I got yelled at for sleeping in class too... I had swimming class right
before, and I guess I went a little overboard..."

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! Glad to see nothing's changed back home.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Congratulations on your international G1 win, El! The news here can't
stop talking about you!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
"Hehe, seems I'm a real celebrity back home! However! I will not be
satisfied with this level of accomplishment!"

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
"My goal is to be the world's strongest! That's why I will be taking on
a BIG race no Japanese Umamusume has ever won before!"

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
"By taking home the gold at the Prix de l'Arc de Triomphe, I will have
officially achieved my dream!"

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yeah! We're all rooting for you!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: And it's not just us. All of Japan is behind you, El.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
But as your friends—and your rivals—we all expect to see an amazing
performance at your next race.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
"And I'm looking forward to seeing you race, Grass! Don't you dare
forget, we promised to race again someday!"

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Yes, and I cannot wait... for that day.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Now, let's talk about me next!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hey, wait a minute, shouldn't I be next in line?

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Hey! What about me?! I'm here too!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: El...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The pack's turning the fourth corner into the final stretch! This year's
Derby Umamusume, Special Week, surges ahead from the outside!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Special Week! Special Week takes the lead! But senior racer Air
Groove "The Empress" is closing in!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Swooping in, it's El Condor! El Condor! El Condor Pasa takes the win
at the last moment!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The distance proved no challenge for her! Despite her inexperience
as a classic racer, El Condor Pasa has conquered the Japan Cup!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Wheeze!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Huff... Phew...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: That sure was one intense race, Spe!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huff... puff... Ehehe, yeah!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: (I'll never forget that Japan Cup... El was just so cool.)

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
(After going up against such an amazing runner, I realized I still had
more to give in my races. I wouldn't have learned that without her.)

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
(Just watching her gets my heart beating... That sensation must be
why everyone expects so much from El.)

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: (Someday, I wanna be an Umamusume like that!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Takarazuka Kinen... a race that rounds off the first half of the
Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As this grand stage approaches, Special Week's fervor at training only
increases.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Hraaauuugh!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Phew... That's three laps on the dirt track! Trainer, what should I do
next?

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
Let's do some incline training. Focus on maintaining your speed
throughout—enough that you feel some strain.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Right! Okay, here I gooo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: She sure is motivated, that Special Week.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
There's a reason she was number one in the polls... But even
considering that, she's been extra gung-ho lately.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
As long as she doesn't overdo it, I see it as a good thing. It just means
her heart's in her training.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Her heart's in her training...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
When we were aiming for the spring Tenno Sho, we tried out all sorts
of techniques. I suppose this is quite similar.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I felt like I was facing my dream head-on. Perhaps Special Week is
feeling the same thing.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Facing her dream head-on, huh?

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: All right, let's call it a day.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: All right, let's call it a day.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Okaaay! Great work, everybody!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Just so you know, that's especially true for you, Spe! It's like your
engine was on FULL BLAAAST! I had a hard time keeping up.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe... It's kinda weird, but my body was just bubbling with energy
today.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
If this keeps up, your performance at the Takarazuka Kinen is sure to
impress!

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Yeah, let's end the spring on a high note with a win!

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Yeah, let's end the spring on a high note with a win!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ah, actually... Trainer, I have a request of sorts!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Right now, Suzuka is doing her best in America, and the same goes
for El in France. They've got lots of fans cheering them on.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
As racers trained in Japan, naturally they're representing the whole
nation on the world stage, and the fans are eager to see them
succeed.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Do you remember when I mentioned that the key to being the best
racer in Japan might be to become an Umamusume who makes
everyone smile?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I think Suzuka and El are exactly the type of Umamusume I want to
be.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I want to be a racer worth supporting—one who takes all of her fans'
dreams and makes them come true. So if I win the Takarazuka Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I want to follow El's example and take on the Prix de l'Arc de
Triomphe!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: The Prix de l'Arc de Triomphe?! Really?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: No wonder you were workin' overtime at practice!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: That's right!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you haven't changed one bit since you joined us. Your dreams
are always on such a grand scale, Special Week.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wh-what do you think, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Just like her teammates, I have trouble concealing my surprise.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, one look into Special Week's eyes tells me how serious she
is. She's ready to make her dreams come true.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
Well, you did say you needed to aim for the top if you want your
dream to come true.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
Well, you did say you needed to aim for the top if you want your
dream to come true.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
But if you want to be a racer worthy of your fans' dreams... You have
to show them you can make those dreams come true first.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
But if you want to be a racer worthy of your fans' dreams... You have
to show them you can make those dreams come true first.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Does that mean...
choice_data_list:
We'll turn our sights to the world stage once
you steal the spotlight at the Takarazuka Kinen!

We'll turn our sights to the world stage once
you steal the spotlight at the Takarazuka Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Okay!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To become an Umamusume worthy of her fans' dreams... and one who
can make those dreams come true...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With her international debut now hinging on the Takarazuka Kinen,
Special Week buckles down and approaches her training with
renewed vigor.
